_comment: exp_015 — GRPO pass 2. Four changes from exp_009: (1) start from exp_009 GRPO model not base, (2) fresh difficulty-v2 curriculum filtered to max_correct=1 + allow_clipped + FF:MCQ>=2 (the strict 1-3 filter produced reward_std=0 on the trained policy), (3) max_completion_length=4096 to fix exp_010 OOM, (4) added a continuous length_bonus to format_reward (max 0.05) so reward_std is guaranteed > 0 even when correctness+discrete-format collapse to identical buckets across the 4 generations.
_curriculum_note: Pending DSMLP run — intermediate-difficulty prompts (1-3/4 correct) re-sampled from the exp_009 GRPO model via sample_difficulty_v2.py.

length_bonus.note: Continuous descent from 0.05 at len=0 to 0.0 at cap. Guarantees nonzero reward_std as long as completions in a group differ in length; secondary objective is conciseness.

_ref_model_note: ref_model intentionally unset — TRL defaults ref=base_model=exp_009 GRPO, making this a true continuation. Do NOT override to base Thinking-2507 or it will pull the policy backward.

vllm._note: Kaggle inference config after training. Use cse151b-notebook with model_id set to the merged pass2 model.
